user.title: Pool RGB LED
user.description: Provide either a target relay/light entity OR a KNX group address (e.g. 1/2/3). KNX direct-write skips the entity layer and gives more consistent pulse timing. The integration drives the LED by briefly cutting power.

data.target_entity: Target light or switch (optional if KNX address is set)

error.invalid_knx_address: Not a valid KNX group address (expected e.g. 1/2/3).
error.need_target_or_knx: Set either a target entity or a KNX group address.

data.target_entity: Target light or switch (optional if KNX address is set)

error.invalid_knx_address: Not a valid KNX group address (expected e.g. 1/2/3).
error.need_target_or_knx: Set either a target entity or a KNX group address.

resync.name: Resync
resync.description: Issue a double power-cut to reset the LED. Lands on Blue (color 2).

set_mode.name: Set mode
set_mode.description: Step forward to a specific color or sequence.
